title: elaeocarpus acrantherus
intro: Elaeocarpus acrantherus is a plant species in the family Elaeocarpaceae, native to New Guinea and the surrounding islands. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Elaeocarpus acrantherus include wound healing, antiseptic properties, and potential anti-cancer effects. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the leaves and stems, which can then be infused in hot water or used in traditional medicine.
